notes: Game works native (but only in FullHD, not any higher resolution) and on Proton out of the box even in 4k. I installed manually D9VK, but the game crashed with D9VK.
title: Shadwen

notes: Game works native on Linux. It works fine out of the box on Proton, but there is a white box visible slihgtly over half of the screen. I installed D9VK and it worked great too with this DX9 to Vulkan translation, even when testing it with the new ACO compiler.
title: Shadwen
